channel.title: Obsidian on cron.umbe.me
channel.description: Recent content in Obsidian on cron.umbe.me

item.title: Build a Personal Knowledge Graph with Claude and Obsidian
item.description: Transform your Claude AI conversations into persistent, interconnected knowledge using Karpathy’s LLM Wiki pattern. Build custom commands like /wiki and /save that sync bidirectionally with Obsidian for a growing personal knowledge graph.
